prompt: Create a realistic indoor lifestyle photograph in a cozy bedroom at night: an adult woman with shoulder-length light brown hair sits casually on a messy white bed, posed with one knee bent forward and one leg folded to the side, leaning on her left hand with her elbow on a white pillow while her right arm rests down across the bedding. She wears a fitted white camisole tank top with thin straps, black athletic shorts with white trim, and a simple black hair tie on one wrist; a partial glimpse of eyeglass frames is visible at the edge of her face. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered solid square censor block in a muted brown skin-tone color, covering the entire facial area. In the background, include exactly 5 notable bedroom elements: a warm bedside table lamp glowing on the left, a small bedside table with toiletry bottles, a window with horizontal blinds behind her, rumpled white pillows and duvet across the bed, and one orange tabby cat curled up asleep on the right side of the bed. Use warm tungsten lighting mixed with soft dim ambient window light, natural skin texture, shallow depth of field, candid smartphone-photo realism, vertical 4:5 composition, intimate but non-explicit mood, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
